reasoning: Content B contains the hades.fandom snippet ('smoother, snappier fighting style') and the reddit snippet ('adjusted properties of Attacks and Specials for improved flow and feel'), both of which align with the anchor's actual June 17, 2025 Unseen Update description of the Umbral Flames rework.
